directive.title: Dashboard performance instrumentation and budget assertion

auditor.summary: The generated code successfully implements the core performance instrumentation library (lib/perf.ts), modifies both RFQ routes with Server-Timing headers and PerfStore integration, and creates the health/perf endpoint. However, two critical files were not generated due to truncation: scripts/ci-perf-gate.sh and modifications to scripts/preflight.sh. These are required for CI gating and preflight integration. The code that was generated is well-structured, type-safe, and follows the spec closely. The build is recoverable with the addition of the missing files. Score is reduced due to missing critical acceptance criteria (criteria 14-19).

top_issues.description: File was not generated due to truncation. This is a required file per the build spec. The CI gate logic cannot be verified.
File was not modified to include the AUTO-029 step. Required step '# AUTO-029: EQS DB query performance gate' is missing.

serializeServerTiming uses toFixed(1) which may produce unexpected rounding. For dur=42.5, toFixed(1) returns '42.5' which matches expected. However, for values like 42.55, toFixed(1) returns '42.5' (rounds down) which could cause precision issues. The spec expects exact values.
